design.description: Looking for suggestions on form structure, hints, and validation states.

research.description: Reviewing past answers to tune future polls more accurately.

feature.title: New feature priorities

navigation.title: Navigation clarity

validation.usernameMax: Username must be no longer than 50 characters
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Sign in again
errors.unauthorized: You do not have access to this action
errors.validation: Check the form data and try again

errors.server: The server is temporarily unavailable. Try again later
